title: [InstCombine] Avoid invalid bitcast across address spaces in foldIntegerTypedPHI
author: michalpaszkowski
description: Only use a PtrToInt's source pointer as an available pointer value when its pointer type exactly matches the inttoptr target type. This prevents creating an invalid bitcast between differing address spaces during foldIntegerTypedPHI.

tests.test_body:
define float @phi_ptrtoint_different_addrspace(ptr addrspace(1) noundef %ptr, i1 %cond) {
entry:
  %alloca = alloca ptr addrspace(1), align 8, addrspace(4)
  %ptr.int = ptrtoint ptr addrspace(1) %ptr to i64
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %loop.latch, %entry
  %phi = phi i64 [ %ptr.int, %entry ], [ %alloca.int, %loop.latch ]
  br i1 %cond, label %loop.latch, label %exit

loop.latch:                                       ; preds = %loop
  %alloca.int = ptrtoint ptr addrspace(4) %alloca to i64
  br label %loop

exit:                                             ; preds = %loop
  %phi.ptr = inttoptr i64 %phi to ptr addrspace(1)
  %val = load float, ptr addrspace(1) %phi.ptr, align 4
  ret float %val
}
